name: Aircall
description: Cloud-based phone system for business. Monitor user access, role-based controls, and sync employees from Aircall.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Aircall Dashboard at https://dashboard.aircall.io
2. Go to Company Settings
3. In the API Keys section, click 'Add a new API key'
4. Copy the API ID and API Token
5. Enter them below

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Aircall users with their email and availability status to verify employee access controls.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies Aircall user roles by retrieving individual user details to check admin vs agent role separation.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks Aircall webhook configurations to verify monitoring and alerting is properly set up for call and user events.
